methods.sourceDisplayName: 炽蛇军 TI-92 运兵车

provenance.excerpt: An unranked Pressure Point is given upon completion of The Teacher Quest.
Affects base damage which is applied before every other damage type. Therefore, every other damage increasing mod is benefiting from Pressure Point as well.

Affects damage dealt by regular attacks, slide attacks, wall attacks and jump attacks (not to be confused with the AoE damage that is dealt simultaneously with a jump attack which is considered slam damage).
Stacks with Spoiled Strike for +220% attack damage.
